zh.lifeSummary: 當William Folkeroy於1360年出生在英國英格蘭戴文邦藍 巴頓時，他的父親John Folkeroy48歲，母親Agnes Le Baron35歲。他於大約1374年與Joan Folkeroy在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1424年在他的家鄉享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Folkeroy于1360年出生在英国英格兰戴文邦藍 巴頓时，他的父亲John Folkeroy48岁，母亲Agnes Le Baron35岁。他于大约1374年与Joan Folkeroy在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1424年在他的家乡享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Folkeroy was born in 1360, in Buckland Barton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Folkeroy, was 48 and his mother, Agnes Le Baron, was 35. He married Joan Folkeroy about 1374, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died about 1424, in his hometown, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Folkeroy est né en 1360, à Buckland Barton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Folkeroy, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Agnes Le Baron, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Joan Folkeroy environ 1374, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé environ 1424, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: William Folkeroyが1360年にイギリスイギリスデボンブックランド バートンで生まれた時，父John Folkeroyは48歳，母Agnes Le Baronは35歳であった。約1374年にイギリスイギリスデボンでJoan Folkeroyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は約1424年に故郷で65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Folkeroy(이)가 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 벅랜드 바턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Folkeroy(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Le Baron(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1374년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Joan Folkeroy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1424년 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Folkeroy родился в 1360 г. в местности буккланд бартон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Folkeroy было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Le Baron, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Folkeroy около 1374 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер около 1424 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет.
